text.title: guardrails-nemo Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for guardrails-nemo as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Configuring NeMo Guardrails without a fallback for the Colang runtime LLM being unavailable.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: NeMo requires a running LLM for the Colang runtime itself, not just for main responses. If the LLM endpoint is unavailable, the entire rails system fails. Design a graceful degradation path (default-block or default-pass) that activates when the runtime LLM is unreachable.

failure-mode.description: Setting max_reasks to unlimited in NeMo retry-on-fail configuration.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Guardrails AI's retry-on-fail mechanism and NeMo's retry behavior can cause agents to loop indefinitely. Set max_reasks=3 and handle the failure case explicitly with a fallback response.
